text: Enantioselective allylation is a widely used organic transformation in the synthesis of chiral homoallylic alcohols and amines. The resulting heterocyclic and nonheterocyclic chiral homoallylic alcohols and amines have been incorporated into the synthesis of many natural products and pharmaceuticals.
